sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lo lai-ah nasep ding a omlai-ah,
Buh athun zo nasem dingte tawm pha;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa in thahatna a hong piading hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungdam na tawh la pha takpi sa un;
Pha takpi na sem niloh un.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nasepna haksa ni a sawt hang-in,
in nopna lian a ngah ding;
Topa in a teel sa mita dingin,
Nopna pha bel hong pia ding

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa'n itna tawh a mau sam ding a,
A tawntung maangkhawm ding uh hi.
